title: Tinnitus

red_flags.text: Supports review of suicide risk, neurological or vestibular symptoms, sudden hearing loss, distress, objective, unilateral, asymmetric, and pulsatile tinnitus, and clinician-arranged referral.
red_flags.rationale: Supports mapped unilateral, pulsatile, sudden-hearing, vestibular, neurological, worsening, and referral fields.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports review of suicide risk, neurological or vestibular symptoms, sudden hearing loss, distress, objective, unilateral, asymmetric, and pulsatile tinnitus, and clinician-arranged referral.

examination.text: Supports audiological assessment, selected tympanometry, neurological or otological context, and differentiated imaging review for pulsatile, unilateral, asymmetric, or otherwise concerning tinnitus.
examination.rationale: Supports mapped hearing assessment and clinician-reviewed audiology fields.
examination.evidence_extract: Supports audiological assessment, selected tympanometry, neurological or otological context, and differentiated imaging review for pulsatile, unilateral, asymmetric, or otherwise concerning tinnitus.

investigations.text: Requires full relevant history, hearing and communication needs, psychosocial and activity impact, otoscopy, pure-tone audiometry, tympanometry when indicated, personalised plans, hearing options, follow-up, questions, and support.
investigations.rationale: Supports mapped adult otoscopy and hearing-screen fields only when hearing loss is relevant.
investigations.evidence_extract: Requires full relevant history, hearing and communication needs, psychosocial and activity impact, otoscopy, pure-tone audiometry, tympanometry when indicated, personalised plans, hearing options, follow-up, questions, and support.

source_limitations: Medication history, ear fullness, headache, cervical bruit, generic ENT examination, fixed four-to-six-week timing, previous-record review, and combined medication or noise review remain unsupported.
No UAE-specific exact source was found.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
